

```{r}


exp <- "EXPIII"

if (exp == "EXPIII"){
    line_palette <- c("#ff00ff", "#ff2400", "#6600cc", "#0000ff")
    breaks_step <- 50
    line_labels <- c("MT-2_1", "MT-2_2", "MT-4_1", "MT-4_2")
} else{
    line_palette <- c("#66ff66", "#009900", "#00cc99", "#558000")
    breaks_step <- 5
    line_labels <- c("MT-2_i", "MT-2_ii", "MT-2_iii", "MT-2_iv")
}

counts[counts$exp_line == "MT2_3" & counts$passage == 430,"mut_count"] <- 125

head(counts)
str(counts)

fig <- counts %>%  ggplot(aes(x=passage, y = mut_count, color = exp_line)) +
        geom_line(linewidth=2) +
        labs(x="\nTransfer", y= "Mutation Count\n", color = "Virus Line", title = paste0(category, " Mutation Accumulation in ", exp))+
        scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0,570,50)) +
        scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,400),breaks = seq(0,400,50)) +
        scale_color_manual(labels = line_labels, values = line_palette) +
        theme_bw() +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 60, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 55),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 45, angle = 90),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 45),
        legend.title = element_text(size=50),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 45))


png(paste0("/Users/alimos313/Documents/studies/phd/hpc-research/genome-evo-proj/results/figs/presentation/candoc/", category, "_accumulation_", exp, ".png")
    , width = 1400, height = 1600)
fig
dev.off()


pdf(paste0("/Users/alimos313/Documents/studies/phd/hpc-research/genome-evo-proj/results/figs/presentation/candoc/", category, "_accumulation_", exp, ".pdf")
    , width = 21, height = 23)
fig
dev.off()


```
